arts.ttl: Matthijs de Ligt names Manchester United's area for improvement after Arsenal defeat
arts.sum: Man Utd were hopeful of securing a result against Arsenal but suffered a 2-0 defeat at The Emirates on Wednesday.

arts.ttl: Why aren't Liverpool, Arsenal and Man Utd playing at the FIFA Club World Cup 2025?
arts.sum: Ahead of the draw for the FIFA Club World Cup 2025, we look at why the likes of Arsenal, Manchester United and Liverpool will not be involved in the competition, which the US host next summer

arts.ttl: Gabriel, Calafiori, White - Latest Arsenal injury news and return dates for Fulham - football.london
arts.sum: Thankfully for Arteta, no fresh injury concerns appeared to be suffered but he faces a tense wait on Gabriel and Calafiori with their next game against Fulham arriving in just three days. Gabriel Magalhaes, Thomas Partey and Mikel Merino were all doubts heading into the clash, though the latter duo both featured with Partey playing the full 90 minutes.

arts.ttl: Man Utd transfer news: Ruben Amorim forced into Viktor Gyokeres rethink as priority becomes clear
arts.sum: Manchester United are set to be busy in the January transfer window as Ruben Amorim looks to bring in players to match the new style he is looking to deploy at Old Trafford

Set pieces did the damage yet again, with Jurrien Timber turning in a Declan Rice delivery eight minutes after half-time to register his first goal for the club, and then on 73 minutes his fellow defender Saliba saw the ball cannon in off him in fortuitous circumstances to double the lead. The 500th competitive men’s game at Emirates Stadium was one to remember as goals from Jurrien Timber and William Saliba saw us clinch a fourth straight win over Manchester United for the first time ever.

arts.ttl: The storm arrives for Amorim: Lessons from Man Utd's loss at Arsenal
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim suffered his first league defeat since December 2023 at Arsenal - and his first Premier League loss was a reality check of the task he has on his hands at Manchester United.

arts.ttl: Arsenal are 'the new STOKE CITY,' claims Dimitar Berbatov - after Mikel Arteta's side scored from two corners to continue impressive set-piece success in Man United victory
arts.sum: Though Liverpool remain favourites to win the Premier League, Arsenal are just behind them with the bookmakers and a large reason for that is their success from dead ball situations.

arts.ttl: Arsenal’s corners are unstoppable - but don’t call them Stoke just yet
arts.sum: Arsenal 2-0 Manchester United: The Gunners scored two more goals from corners to underline their set-piece threat but Mikel Arteta was more concerned about creating other ‘magic moments’

arts.ttl: Man United injury news: What is Luke Shaw's latest injury? How long will he be sidelined?
arts.sum: New details emerge about Luke Shaw's latest Manchester United injury setback, including the specific issue and a predicted recovery period.

arts.ttl: Hits and misses: Arsenal's psychological edge | Chelsea enter title race?
arts.sum: Then, when Ruben Amorim's side were expecting Bukayo Saka to follow Declan Rice's example and direct his delivery to the same spot, he instead outfoxed Manchester United by looping one to the far post, where Thomas Partey was waiting to head across goal for William Saliba. Even in the first half of Arsenal's 2-0 win over Manchester United, before Jurrien Timber's breakthrough goal, the home supporters inside the Emirates Stadium could be heard celebrating corners as though they were goals.
